     the Fermi energy is     2.2568 ev

!    total energy              =   -8184.68165699 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.6E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.29168551 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -281285.74296725 Ry
